title: ventilago borneensis
intro: Ventilago borneensis, also known as the Borneo ironwood or belian tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ventilago borneensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, while also being used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional due to potential side effects.
